{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323185301307D70F3026F33864435"}"},"total":2384},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7139186884936352515","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"作者思路严谨，必是熟读史书的，笔下人物形象跃然纸上，每个人物都活灵活现的，心理活动描写非常细致，把主角的抱负，志向，谋略，矛盾和时代的局限性写的很清晰，需要沉下心仔细看这本书，越看越爱看，我觉得是可以从书中收益的，已经推荐给身边的朋友们看了，唯一美中不足的就是看不够啊，更新快一点吧作者君"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1662221692,"group_id":"6954346865684909070","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5NdHL/jFXPBMrd1iNXfRCHX7FTVrlmMKUc6oSS7KeMy","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/aaeed87a1e52411aa0109db2c3ba556f~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776789786&x-signature=WnEW5B2U9gUW1MRnnUY80qNBuZw%3D","user_id":"4407276517461672","user_name":"妹妹吃香蕉吗"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4407276517461672","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1663511886,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE4D8","can_worn":false,"id":4,"name":"元气满满","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9b065c2d8cda96cbf7fdda5c311d871a","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d04cdb6a2447c1029287dc9120659d09"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6954346865684909070","book_info":{"abstract":"大宋战神狄青，战阵何等威势？战功何等荣耀？不过惶惶不可终日，惊惧而终！
这大宋朝，悲哀不远，终究要有人来掀桌子！
狄咏来了，改变一切！
欧阳修，包拯，王安石，司马光，曾巩，苏轼，苏辙……这是大宋的风华。
马踏党项，推平契丹，压制女真，统治草原，再开西域……这是狄咏的人生。

e":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"6983204088200577806","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"挺好看的，这是我第二本看没系统的历史小说，也是从神偷的我爷爷是朱元璋过来的，这本书我个人觉得都可以在番茄上前几的好书，感觉这个评分太低了，应该是在9.3～9.5之间，还有就是作者是按照他自己的观念来写的，和有些读者理解不同，真的没必要一点小事就说这本书这不行那不行，真的是没这个必要。","text_exts":[{"e":20,"s":16,"text":"历史小说","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%8E%86%E5%8F%B2%E5%B0%8F%E8%AF%B4&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177426318133864435%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%226983204088200577806%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%226954346865684909070%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%8E%86%E5%8F%B2%E5%B0%8F%E8%AF%B4%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1625903906,"group_id":"6954346865684909070","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"先娶观音再取经，不负如来不负卿
